# MARCORAEX
The Command Center for the MARCO Neural Army.

## Mission
To provide autonomous AI orchestration and offensive security automation via a unified 25-agent military-grade framework.

## Core Services
- The General: Strategic planning and task delegation.
- The Soldier: Execution and tactical automation.
- Tactical Plans: Tiered access from Recruit (Trial) to Elite.

## Links
- About: https://marcorex-ai.vercel.app/about
- Capabilities: https://marcorex-ai.vercel.app/features
- Pricing: https://marcorex-ai.vercel.app/plans
